name: nlb
title: AWS Load Balancer — Network Load Balancer
summary: Creates an L4 NLB with TCP/UDP/TLS listeners, target groups (instance/ip/alb), cross- zone load balancing, and deletion protection on by default. Target registration is the consumer's responsibility.

governance.name: prefix
governance.description: Short organization or project prefix. First token of every resource name: {prefix}-{cloud}-{environment}-{resource-type}-{suffix}.

governance.name: environment
governance.description: Deployment environment identifier (e.g., dev, test, prod). Used in resource names and mandatory tags.

governance.name: owner
governance.description: Team or individual that owns the deployed resources. Applied as the mandatory 'owner' tag.

governance.name: cost_center
governance.description: Cost center code for chargeback/showback. Applied as the mandatory 'cost_center' tag.

governance.name: additional_tags
governance.description: Optional additional tags merged beneath the mandatory tag set. Mandatory tags win on key collision.

governance.name: name_suffix
governance.description: Final token of every resource name, used to disambiguate multiple instances of this module.

module.name: vpc_id
module.description: ID of the VPC hosting the NLB and target groups. Supplied by ID — no framework dependency is implied.

module.name: subnet_ids
module.description: Subnet IDs for the NLB (one per AZ; a single subnet is permitted for an NLB, unlike an ALB).

module.name: internal
module.description: Whether the NLB is internal (true) or internet-facing (false).

module.name: security_group_ids
module.description: Security group IDs attached to the NLB. NOTE: security groups can only be attached at creation; adding them later forces replacement. Empty list = no SGs (pre-2023 behavior).

module.name: enable_deletion_protection
module.description: Enable deletion protection on the NLB (governance/resource-locks). Must be disabled and applied before destroy.

module.name: enable_cross_zone_load_balancing
module.description: Distribute traffic across targets in all enabled AZs (per-AZ data charges may apply).

module.name: target_groups
module.type: map(object({ port = number protocol = string target_type = optional(string, "instance") deregistration_delay = optional(number, 300) preserve_client_ip = optional(bool) proxy_protocol_v2 = optional(bool, false) health_check = optional(object({ port = optional(string, "traffic-port") protocol = optional(string, "TCP") path = optional(string) healthy_threshold = optional(number, 3) unhealthy_threshold = optional(number, 3) interval = optional(number, 30) }), {}) }))
module.description: Target groups keyed by logical name. Target registration is the consumer's responsibility.

module.name: listeners
module.type: map(object({ port = number protocol = string target_group_key = string certificate_arn = optional(string) ssl_policy = optional(string, "ELBSecurityPolicy-TLS13-1-2-2021-06") }))
module.description: Listeners keyed by logical name. NLB listeners forward to exactly one target group (no rule-based routing at L4).

outputs.name: lb_id
outputs.description: ARN of the network load balancer.

outputs.name: lb_zone_id
outputs.description: Route 53 hosted zone ID of the NLB (for alias records).

outputs.name: listener_ids
outputs.description: Map of logical listener name to listener ARN.

outputs.name: backend_ids
outputs.description: Map of logical target group name to target group ARN. Register targets against these in the consumer root module.
